Response.Say: Hi, you've reached Stromation, where we help businesses save time through smart automation.

We're sorry we missed your call. Please leave your name, your company name, a good callback number, and a brief description of what you're looking to automate. We'll get back to you within one business day.
Go ahead and leave your message after the tone.
We didn't catch a recording. You can also text us at this number or visit stromation dot com. Goodbye.
